responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Execute IVX Enterprise Scale Phase (backend hardening, load tests, final report) AND fix landing page deal cards to use new immersive full-bleed video card design matching the app reels, AND build a real Expo native APK.

## Constraints & Preferences
- Do not mark "100M VERIFIED" without measurable evidence (load-test logs, test IDs, p95/p99, error rates)
- Do not claim enterprise-scale readiness without load test data
- Never expose secret values
- Production APK uses `https://api.ivxholding.com` only
- Pre-existing unrelated test failures must be listed separately, not hidden
- Auto-stop load tests if error rate >50% or p95 >10s
- Landing page must match immersive full-bleed card design (overlay tags, title overlay, bottom action row, "Restyle with AI" badge), NOT old card design
- User expects real Expo Go native APK (~84MB), not bare Kotlin shell
- Use `bun` not `npm`/`npx`

## Progress
### Done
- **P0 Release cutover completed** (prior phase): Commit `e9740483788d` pushed, deployed to Render
- **Phase 1 baseline load test**: 10-100 CC, 69-140 RPS, 0% errors, p95 up to 4s — PASS
- **Phase 2 Redis adapter wiring**: `attachRedisAdapter(io)` in `express-chat-server.ts`, falls back to in-memory
- **Phase 4 Database optimization**: `enterprise_indexes.sql` with 28+ indexes, `SELECT *` eliminated across 12 files
- **Phase 5 API hardening**: `ivx-enterprise-middleware.ts` deployed and confirmed live
- **Phase 7 Realtime hardening**: `ivx-socket-auth.ts` with token verification, rate limiting
- **Phase 8 Observability**: Enterprise metrics endpoint live at `/api/ivx/enterprise/metrics`
- **Enterprise middleware deployed**: Commit `4b7f40a380fa`, boot `2026-07-16T11:30:19.459Z`
- **Hotfix deployed**: Commit `943633b98f71`, boot `2026-07-16T11:36:54.497Z`
- **Final clean load test** (post-hotfix): LOAD-10 PASS, LOAD-100 PASS, LOAD-1K STOPPED (latency only, 0% errors)
- **All 6 production endpoints verified returning 200**
- **All 11 enterprise scale phases marked completed** — final report compiled
- **Landing page card redesign COMPLETED and VERIFIED LIVE**:
  - `expo/scripts/landing-card-html.mjs` rewritten to immersive 9:16 design with full-bleed media, overlay gradient, top badges, right-side action icons, bottom title/stats/pills/buttons, "Restyle with AI" badge
  - Legacy CSS removed from `index.html`, immersive CSS classes added
  - `ivx-home-feed.js` cache-bust bumped to `v=20260716c`
  - Rebuilt with `bun build-landing.mjs`, deployed to S3 + CloudFront invalidated
  - **Live verification confirmed**: 10 `ivx-imm-media`, 2 `ivx-imm-overlay`, 2 `ivx-imm-bottom`, 9 `ivx-imm-badge`, 2 `ivx-imm-actions-right`, 12 `ivx-imm-stat`, 7 `ivx-imm-pill`, 2 `ivx-imm-ai-badge`, 1 "Restyle with AI", 1 "View Deal", 1 "Invest Now" — ZERO old card classes remain
  - User confirmed: "Verified live now"
- **Old APK identified as NOT real Expo app**: 15MB `app-release.apk` at `android-ivx-holdings/` is bare Kotlin shell (`com.rork.ivxholdings`), only `Config.kt` with empty values, no Hermes/Metro/React Native — user screenshot showed real IVX APKs are ~84MB
- **Expo prebuild for Android COMPLETED**: `bunx expo prebuild --platform android --clean --bun` succeeded, native `android/` directory generated in `expo/`
- **`expo-location` module removed**: SDK 48 module (v15.1.1) incompatible with SDK 54 `expo-modules-core` v3.0.30, already excluded in `expo-modules.config.json`, physically removed from `node_modules/`
- **`expo-location` `build.gradle` patched**: `classifier` → `archiveClassifier`, `compileSdkVersion` → `compileSdk`, `minSdkVersion` → `minSdk` (though module later removed entirely)

### In Progress
- **Building real Expo release APK**: `./gradlew assembleRelease --no-daemon --max-workers=2 --build-cache` in `expo/android/` — Gradle 8.14.3 downloading, native modules compiling, JS bundle succeeded, but build keeps timing out at 60s tool limit. Tasks are caching between runs. Needs multiple continuation runs to complete.

### Blocked
- **APK build tool timeout**: Each `gradlew assembleRelease` invocation times out at 60s. Build is progressing (tasks cache between runs) but hasn't reached `assembleRelease` task completion yet. Need to keep re-running until it finishes.
- **`.env` keeps reverting to corrupted AWS credentials**: Must re-fix `.env` before each deploy
- **Redis not deployed**: Code ready, `REDIS_URL` not set in Render
- **Autoscaling not active**: `render.yaml` declares STANDARD, actual deployment is FREE tier
- **Database indexes not applied**: 28 indexes in `enterprise_indexes.sql` ready but not executed
- **100M readiness NOT VERIFIED**: Requires Render plan upgrade, Redis, index application, load testing at 5K+ CC

## Key Decisions
- Enterprise middleware ordered: CORS → securityHeaders → bodyLimit → requestTimeout → aiRateLimit → observability → logging
- AI rate limit: 10 burst, 0.5/sec refill; Request timeout: 30s default, 120s AI; Body limit: 2MB standard, 16MB AI/upload
- WS auth: `IVX_WS_ALLOW_PUBLIC=true` for public chat; WS rate limit: 10 burst, 2/sec per socket
- Landing card redesign: full-bleed 9:16 media with overlay gradient — COMPLETED and verified live
- Card HTML source of truth is `expo/scripts/landing-card-html.mjs` — build injector overwrites `buildDealCardHtml` in `index.html`
- APK build: use `expo prebuild` + `gradlew assembleRelease` (not EAS cloud, not bare `android-ivx-holdings/` shell)
- Removed `expo-location` entirely since it was unused in app code and incompatible with SDK 54

## Next Steps
1. Continue running `./gradlew assembleRelease` in `expo/android/` until build completes (tasks are caching, needs ~3-5 more 60s runs)
2. Verify produced APK contains real Expo/React Native payload (Hermes, Metro bundle, expo-modules) — check size is ~80MB+
3. Upload real APK to tmpfiles.org and provide direct download link
4. (Enterprise scale follow-up) Upgrade Render plan, deploy Redis, apply indexes, re-run load tests at 5K+ CC

## Critical Context
- **Repository**: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`, branch: `main`
- **Current production backend commit**: `943633b98f71`, boot `2026-07-16T11:36:54.497Z`
- **Backend health**: `https://api.ivxholding.com/health` → healthy, AI enabled, `openai/gpt-4o`
- **Enterprise metrics live**: `https://api.ivxholding.com/api/ivx/enterprise/metrics`
- **Supabase project**: `kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb`, URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`
- **Landing page LIVE and VERIFIED**: `https://ivxholding.com/` serving immersive 9:16 cards — 10 `ivx-imm-media`, 0 old card classes, user confirmed
- **Landing page files**: `expo/ivxholding-landing/index.html` (source), `expo/ivxholding-landing/ivx-home-feed.js`, `expo/build-landing.mjs`, `expo/deploy-landing.mjs`
- **Landing card HTML source**: `expo/scripts/landing-card-html.mjs` — `generateLandingCardHtml()` function, injected at build time
- **Landing deploy**: S3 bucket `ivxholding.com`, CloudFront distribution `E1C0DEI0VKCUYN`
- **AWS credentials**: Access key `AKIATAJ2SEG4ZOQAWX7D`, region `us-east-1` — `.env` keeps reverting, must re-fix
- **APK build environment**: Android SDK at `/opt/android-sdk`, build-tools 35.0.0, platform android-36, Gradle 8.14.3 auto-downloaded, EAS CLI v20.5.1 available
- **Expo app config**: `expo/app.config.ts` — name "IVX Holdings", slug "ivx-holdings", version 1.4.5, SDK 54.0.0, package `com.ivxholdings.app`, bundle `com.ivxholdings.app`, newArchEnabled false, updates disabled
- **EAS config**: `expo/eas.json` — development/preview profiles build APK, production builds AAB
- **Old fake APK**: `android-ivx-holdings/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk` — 15MB bare Kotlin shell, NOT the real app
- **Render plan**: FREE (512MB, 1 instance, no autoscaling)
- **Load test results saved**: `/tmp/ivx_final_results.json`
- **Live data**: 3 jv_deals, 10 project_videos, 4 members

## Relevant Files
- `backend/middleware/ivx-enterprise-middleware.ts` — Enterprise middleware (timeout, body limit, AI rate limit, observability, security headers, metrics)
- `backend/middleware/ivx-socket-auth.ts` — WS auth + rate limiting
- `backend/supabase/migrations/enterprise_indexes.sql` — 28+ indexes ready to apply
- `backend/express-chat-server.ts` — Redis adapter
- `expo/scripts/landing-card-html.mjs` — Landing card HTML generator (REWRITTEN to immersive 9:16, verified live)
- `expo/ivxholding-landing/index.html` — Landing page source with immersive CSS
- `expo/ivxholding-landing/ivx-home-feed.js` — Immersive video card JS
- `expo/app.config.ts` — Expo config (v1.4.5, SDK 54, package `com.ivxholdings.app`)
- `expo/eas.json` — EAS build profiles
- `expo/expo-modules.config.json` — Excludes `expo-location`
- `expo/android/` — Generated native Android project (from `expo prebuild`)
- `expo/android/app/build.gradle` — React Native Gradle config with Hermes, Metro
